title: dot-agents workflow iteration log entry
description: Schema for .agents/active/iteration-log/iter-N.yaml. Two-author model: CLI-deterministic fields are written by 'workflow checkpoint --log-to-iter'; agent fields are filled in by the worker after the stub is created.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Increment when adding required fields.

date.description: CLI: date the checkpoint was written (YYYY-MM-DD).

wave.description: CLI: active plan ID at checkpoint time.

task_id.description: CLI: active task ID from the delegation contract or checkpoint.

commit.description: CLI: git commit SHA at checkpoint time. Empty string if no commits yet.

files_changed.description: CLI: number of files changed (from git diff --stat HEAD~1).

lines_added.description: CLI: lines added (from git diff --stat HEAD~1).

lines_removed.description: CLI: lines removed (from git diff --stat HEAD~1).

first_commit.description: CLI: true when HEAD~1 does not exist; git diff fields default to 0.

item.description: AGENT: brief description of the work done this iteration.

scenario_tags.description: AGENT: coverage tags for this iteration.

feedback_goal.description: AGENT: verification question this iteration was designed to answer.

tests_added.description: AGENT: number of new tests added.

tests_total_pass.description: AGENT: true if full test suite passed, false if not, null if not run.

retries.description: AGENT: number of implementation attempts before the iteration closed.

summary.description: AGENT: prose summary of what was done and why.

self_assessment.description: AGENT: structured self-assessment block. All fields coalesce to their default when absent (for migration compatibility).
